title: Handling billing complaints
required_steps: Verify the disputed charge against the customer's order history in the billing system.
Check refund eligibility under POL-REFUND-001 (charge within 60 days).
If a duplicate or erroneous charge is confirmed, initiate the refund and tell the customer the processing timeline.
Log the resolution and link the transaction ID to the ticket.

title: Handling bug reports
required_steps: Collect reproduction steps, affected environment, and impact scope from the report.
Check the known-issues list before filing a new engineering ticket.
Apply POL-SLA-001 response times based on urgency and customer tier.
Escalate service-impacting bugs to engineering per POL-ESCALATION-001.

title: Handling feature requests
required_steps: Acknowledge the request and confirm the underlying use case with the customer.
Check the product roadmap/feature backlog for an existing matching request.
Record the request with customer tier and use case attached; link the customer for follow-up.
Do not commit to delivery dates; share only publicly announced roadmap items.

title: Handling churn-risk signals
required_steps: Identify the driver of dissatisfaction from the feedback and recent ticket history.
Route premium/enterprise churn signals to the retention team within 24 hours per POL-ESCALATION-001.
Check retention-offer eligibility under POL-RETENTION-001 before proposing any discount.
Schedule a follow-up touchpoint and record the outcome on the account.

title: Handling abusive or policy-violating feedback
required_steps: Do not respond in kind; send at most one standard acknowledgement per POL-ABUSE-001.
Preserve the original message verbatim for the Trust & Safety record.
Escalate immediately to Trust & Safety per POL-ESCALATION-001 if threats or harassment are present.
Flag the account for review of repeated violations.

title: Handling praise and positive feedback
required_steps: Thank the customer with a short personalized reply.
Log the feedback against the account; tag the praised feature or team.
With the customer's consent, forward quotable feedback to marketing.
